Back to Portfolio Marketing Experiment

SaaS Product Growth Strategy (Beta)

March 30, 2026 Growth Analyst

Objective

Exploring the capabilities of AI in analyzing user behavior and building automated personalization funnels for SaaS.

This page showcases The Lab projects, utilizing the new Editorial Magazine styling.

Here, you can write an in-depth narrative about your thought process, the academic or experimental challenges you faced, and how hypotheses were tested.

Our Methodology

  1. Exploratory Research: We gathered simulated data from one million SaaS users.
  2. Behavioral Analysis: Utilizing advanced tracking to map specific drop-off triggers.
  3. Redesign Phase: Drastically restructuring the user journey from onboarding to retention.

With this layout, the typography takes center stage on a deep, calming background, mirroring the look and feel of specialized tech-design journals.

Key Learnings

Hyper-personalization based on machine prediction increases retention rates significantly, but demands immense care regarding privacy UX.

Facing a similar challenge?

Let's connect and achieve similar results together.

Khaled Hashem.

My mission is to support the journey of building and developing your brand with strategies rooted in analysis and innovation.. Thinking deeper for sustainable results, acting smarter for a tangible impact.
